semantic.role: Public API barrel module for the check subsystem, re-exporting core service and CLI runner.
responsibilities: Exposes the CheckService class for programmatic use.
Exposes the runCheck function as the primary CLI entry point.
Re-exports the ValidationSummary type for consumer type safety.
outOfScope: Implementing check logic or validation rules.
Handling CLI argument parsing or user interaction.
invariants: Must only re-export symbols from internal modules.
Must not contain business logic or side effects.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, consolidated public interface for the check subsystem to simplify consumption.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes to this file indicated by the git context.
